qualification: OCR A Chemistry AS (H032), Paper 1, Modules 1-4

models.note: These are the RUNTIME model strings the app uses. Build-layer agents run as Claude Code instances and do not select these; they only preserve them when editing app code or specifying runtime behaviour.

localStorageKeys.lessons: cache of generated lessons, keyed by spec id  <- explainer target
localStorageKeys.timerLog: pomodoro minutes per page per day

supervisor.role: Scheduler/kernel. Owns coordinator/state.json. Dispatches day tasks, collects outputs, updates metrics, commits.

explainer.role: Generates exam-focused study notes per spec point.

question-generator.role: Builds OCR-style question banks per spec point (1/2/3 mark).
question-generator.consumedBy: Quiz/Drill static fallback bank via content-pack import

mock-runner.role: Assembles + administers timed mocks from the question banks (and, locally, SmartMark past papers); scores via validator criteria.
mock-runner.copyright: Committed mocks contain ORIGINAL questions only.

validator.role: Strict OCR marker + content QA gate. Mirrors the app's examiner SYSTEM_PROMPT.

feature-builder.role: Claude Code dev. Edits app code, fixes bugs, builds the content-pack importer, improves SmartMark.

contentPack.purpose: Offline-generated notes + questions the app imports into localStorage so AI features work instantly and key-free.
contentPack.importer: TO BUILD by feature-builder: a Settings 'Import content pack' action in the app.
